See Our Work in Action

Watch how our expert team transforms spaces with professional drylining, partition walls, and suspended ceilings across Edinburgh and the Lothians.

Drylining Edinburgh — Professional partition walls, suspended ceilings, and plasterboard installation across Scotland's capital.

Our Drylining Services

From residential renovations to large commercial fit-outs, we deliver every drylining service you need — all under one roof, fully accredited, and fully insured.

Drylining Contractors

Expert drylining installation for residential and commercial properties across Edinburgh. We create smooth, paint-ready wall finishes quickly and cleanly.

Learn more →

Partition Walls

Build durable, cost-effective partition walls to divide open-plan offices, retail units, and homes. Sound-rated and fire-rated options available.

Learn more →

Suspended Ceilings

Install clean, modern suspended ceilings that hide services, improve acoustics, and enhance lighting. Ideal for offices, retail, and healthcare across Edinburgh.

Learn more →

Metal Stud Partitioning

Lightweight, strong metal stud partitions perfect for commercial fit-outs. Faster to install and easier to modify than traditional timber framing.

Learn more →

Plasterboard Installation

Precision plasterboard fitting for walls and ceilings. Seamless joints, professional finishing, and minimal disruption to your project timeline.

Learn more →

Taping & Jointing

Smooth, crack-resistant finishes with expert taping and jointing. No need for full plastering — faster, cleaner, and ready for decoration.

Learn more →
View All Services

Areas We Cover

We provide drylining, partition walls, and suspended ceiling services across Edinburgh and the Lothians. If your area is not listed, get in touch — we likely still cover it.

Edinburgh

Full drylining services across Edinburgh city centre, New Town, Old Town, Leith, and all surrounding neighbourhoods.

Leith

Professional partition walls and drylining for homes and businesses throughout Leith and the Shore.

Livingston

Serving residential and commercial clients in Livingston with fast quotes and quality workmanship.

Falkirk

Reliable drylining contractors covering Falkirk and the surrounding Central Scotland area.

Dalkeith

Drylining and suspended ceiling installation for Dalkeith businesses and homeowners.

Musselburgh

Experienced drylining teams working across Musselburgh and the surrounding towns.
View All Areas

Why Choose Drylining Edinburgh?

We are not just another drylining company. We are a team of skilled tradespeople who take pride in every board we fix and every seam we tape. Here is what sets us apart:

  • 1
    CSCS Accredited Team Every contractor on our team holds valid CSCS cards and site safety certifications.
  • 2
    £1M Public Liability Insurance Full insurance coverage on every project, giving you total peace of mind.
  • 3
    Free, No-Obligation Quotes Transparent pricing with no hidden fees. We quote honestly and stick to it.
  • 4
    24-Hour Response Time We aim to respond to all enquiries within 24 hours, often the same day.
  • 5
    Clean, Professional Work We leave sites tidy and respect your property — residential or commercial.

Ready to Transform Your Space?

Get your free, no-obligation quote today. Our drylining experts are standing by to help with your project in Edinburgh and beyond.

Get Your Free Quote Call 0131 XXX XXXX

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about our drylining services in Edinburgh.

Drylining is the process of fixing plasterboard to walls, ceilings, or stud frames without using wet plaster. It creates a smooth surface ready for painting or decorating. Our team measures, cuts, and fixes boards precisely, then tapes and joints the seams for an invisible finish.
Most residential rooms can be drylined in 1–2 days. Larger commercial projects depend on scale, but our experienced crews work efficiently to minimise downtime. We provide a clear timeline with every quote.
Yes. We provide completely free quotes for all drylining, partition wall, and suspended ceiling projects in Edinburgh and surrounding areas. Simply fill out our quote form or call us to arrange a site visit.
Absolutely. We carry £1 million public liability insurance, and all our drylining contractors are CSCS accredited. We also comply with health and safety regulations on every site.
Yes. For commercial and office drylining projects in Edinburgh, we can schedule work outside business hours, during weekends, or in phases to minimise disruption to your operations.
